notes: CORRECTION: R02→R14. Body says 'l'exploitant précisera où en est le protocole' — factual inquiry, not a future commitment by exploitant.
CORRECTION: removed M07. Issue is coherence between IT 518-45 instruction and practice — purely documentary (instruction update needed). No periodic control failure demonstrated.

CORRECTION: removed M14. No physical NC observed — exploitant is vigilant but logiciel lacks automatic alerts. Risk is potential future non-compliance (latent documentary/process gap). M07 alone covers the management control system deficiency.
CORRECTION: R02→R14. Body says 'l'exploitant indique être en attente des éléments quantifiables' — factual statement of waiting, not a forward commitment to act.

CORRECTION: replaced M14 with M08. The issue is an error in the EDD PàC (documentary) — the IIC physically confirmed sprinklage is in place (M08 partial conformité). No physical NC observed on terrain justifying M14.

CORRECTION: removed M07, replaced with M01+M14. Extincteurs conforomes (M07 control was OK = not a NC). NC is: zones de regroupement absentes du POI (M01) and not materialized on terrain (M14 — physical absence of signage/markings). M07 was unjustified as the only control checked was found conformant.

CORRECTION: removed M14. Issue is inadequate periodic test (essai simultané non réalisé, only 2 of 3 hydrants tested) — this is M07 (periodic control inadequacy), not M14. No physical site condition observed; the question is test completeness.

CORRECTION: M14→M01. IIC did not physically observe the cuves as still present; they noted absence of proof of evacuation ('l'exploitant n'a pas démontré'). This is a documentary NC (missing attestation), not a physical site observation.
